description_long: This is an octagonal jacuzzi with a robust, geometric exterior structure and a wide, flat rim made of large, irregularly shaped stone or concrete slabs. The interior is filled with water, which appears clean and blue, nearly reaching the top edge of the jacuzzi. The outer walls are smooth and solid, with a few decorative or structural stone slabs protruding slightly from the main surface. The rim is slightly overhanging, providing a comfortable edge for sitting or resting arms. There are no visible jets, control panels, or steps integrated into the design. The overall appearance is modern and minimalistic, suitable for placement in urban parks, private patios, or communal recreational areas.
description: A modern, octagonal jacuzzi with a wide stone rim and smooth, solid walls, filled nearly to the top with blue water. The design is minimalistic and robust, with no visible jets, controls, or steps.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the octagonal shape, wide stone rim, and a few protruding stone slabs on the left wall.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the continuous stone rim and smooth wall surface, with minimal protrusions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted stone rim and a couple of small stone slabs on the lower right wall.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the stone rim and two small stone slabs on the right wall, with a clear view of the water surface.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
